Plan Trip

Best Family | Friendly Resorts in Yercaud, Yelagiri & Chennai (OMR) | Passionate Hotels

Passionate Hotels: Where Every Stay becomes a Journey of Escape, Relaxation, Celebrate​.

We’ve created a comfortable and welcoming experience at what many guests consider the best resort in Yercaud, yelagiri, chennai where every detail is thoughtfully planned to help you relax and feel truly cared for. From the moment you arrive until the time you leave, our focus is on your comfort, ease, and happiness. As a trusted family resort in Yercaud, we ensure a peaceful, safe, and joyful stay for couples, families, and friends—so you can enjoy every moment of your getaway without stress or worry.

Discover Your Perfect Retreat: Celebrate Grandeur, Embrace Serenity​

Yercaud: Relax in Serene Beauty

As a leading family resort in Yercaud, we offer spacious rooms, scenic views, and a calm environment that makes every stay special. Guests consistently choose us as the best resort in Yercaud for weekend holidays, family vacations, and couple retreats.

Yelagiri: Escape to Tranquil Hills

A Yelagiri resort is the perfect choice for a refreshing weekend escape from busy city life. Known for its peaceful climate and scenic hills, Yelagiri has become one of the best weekend getaway destinations for families, couples, and friends.

Chennai: Celebrate the Best Moments

Lynwood Villa is an ideal destination for a peaceful weekend stay in OMR, Chennai, offering a perfect blend of privacy, comfort, and open space. Located along the scenic OMR, for families, friends, and corporate groups looking for a premium stay experience.

What we can offer you

A Taste of Delight, Perfect for Every Occasion

@ YERCAUD
@ CHENNAI
@ YELAGIRI

Where Leisure Meets Fun

A Resort That Feels Like Home

From the moment you arrive, you’ll be greeted with warm hospitality and an inviting atmosphere. Our thoughtfully designed accommodations, paired with modern amenities and natural surroundings, create the perfect setting for relaxation and togetherness.

Perfect for Every Occasion

Be it a weekend escape, a festive celebration, or a group holiday, Passionate Hotels is the destination of choice. Spacious family quarters, curated group packages, and seasonal offers ensure that every guest finds more than just a stay—they find an experience worth repeating.

Explore Nearby: Local Attractions & Experiences

Step beyond our beautiful properties and explore exciting experiences designed to help you relax, discover new places, and celebrate life’s special moments.

Explore the Serenity of Yelagiri Hills

Escape the ordinary and experience trekking through Yelagiri’s lush, winding trails. Discover beautiful panoramic views, breathe in fresh mountain air, and enjoy peaceful moments surrounded by nature, far away from everyday life.

Refreshing Embrace of Jalagamparai Waterfall

Relax and enjoy the calming beauty of Jalagamparai waterfalls. Surrounded by nature, it’s the perfect place to refresh your senses and find peaceful moments by the flowing water.

Discover Mahabalipuram’s Shore Temple

Experience India’s rich heritage at this UNESCO World Heritage site, where stunning ancient architecture stands gracefully by the sea, reflecting timeless history and grandeur

Covelong Beach: Where Golden Sands Meet Calm Seas

Escape the city and relax on the golden sands of Covelong Beach, where calming ocean views and refreshing sea breezes create a peaceful retreat.

Yercaud Lake – Peaceful Boating Amid Scenic Hills

Yercaud Lake rests quietly among rolling green hills, where gentle waters mirror the sky and drifting clouds. As boats glide softly across its surface, the air fills with calm, inviting you to slow down, breathe deep, and lose yourself in the quiet beauty of nature.

Kiliyur Falls – Surrounded by Forests

Pours gracefully through lush green forests, its rushing waters echoing with the rhythm of nature. Cool mist fills the air as the waterfall refreshes the senses, offering a lively yet peaceful escape deep within Yercaud’s natural beauty.

Shevaroy Hills – Lush Green Landscapes

Shevaroy Hills rises in emerald grace,
Cool winds humming through misty skies.
Plantations sway, streams whisper secrets—
A cloud-kissed haven reminding us to breathe and just be.

 
 
 

Pagoda Point – Sunrise Views and Spiritual Calm

Greets the day with golden sunrises that slowly awaken the hills below. Wrapped in silence and spiritual calm, it offers a gentle space where the mind finds peace, the soul feels lighter, and time seems to pause with the rising light.

What our Clients Says

Anita R., Chennai

"The three-room quarters were perfect for our family reunion. Spacious, clean, and cozy. The chef’s food was a highlight!”

Rahul M., Bengaluru

“Our kids loved the play area and pools. We felt safe and relaxed the entire time. Can’t wait to come back!”

Priya S., Coimbatore

“The location is unbeatable. Peaceful mornings, beautiful views, and great hospitality. Highly recommended!”

Sylver Star., Yercaud

Peaceful stay with beautiful hill views, great service, and comfortable rooms. Highly recommended!

Our Founder's Promise: The Essence of Passionate Hotels

Passionate Hotels was born from my love for the serene beauty of the hills and the coast. What began as a dream inspired by Yelagiri has grown into welcoming retreats in Yercaud and Chennai. More than resorts, these are places of warmth, joy, and togetherness. Here, every guest becomes family—sharing laughter, sunsets, and heartfelt moments. When you leave, you carry home not just memories, but a true sense of belonging.

— Arun Venkatesan, Founder of Passionate Hotels

Why Choose Golden Paradise Yercaud

Experience a peaceful stay in Yercaud surrounded by nature, comfort, and scenic hill views. Golden Paradise is the perfect choice for families and couples looking for relaxation.

🌄 Peaceful Location

Located in a calm area away from crowds, offering a relaxing hill-station experience.

🏡 Comfortable Rooms

Spacious, clean, and well-maintained rooms designed for maximum comfort.

🌿 Nature Surroundings

Enjoy fresh air, misty mornings, and beautiful greenery all around the resort.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family Friendly

Perfect for families, couples, and group stays with a safe and peaceful environment.

📍 Prime Location

Close to Yercaud Lake, viewpoints, and major tourist attractions.

💰 Affordable Stay

Enjoy a comfortable and budget-friendly stay without compromising quality.

Yes, many guests choose us as the best resort in Yercaud for weekend getaways. Families and couples prefer this family resort in Yercaud for short trips because of its scenic views and peaceful climate.

Yes, as a well-maintained family resort in Yercaud, we ensure comfort and safety for children and senior citizens. This is why many families consider us the best resort in Yercaud for multi-generation stays.

Why should families choose this resort in Yercaud?

Families choose us for a peaceful holiday experience at a trusted family resort in Yercaud. Our consistent service and calm environment make us the best resort in Yercaud for family vacations.

Is this one of the best resorts in Yercaud for a peaceful stay?

Yes, guests often recommend our property as the best resort in Yercaud for a peaceful and relaxing stay. The calm surroundings and family-friendly atmosphere make it a preferred family resort in Yercaud.

Can families enjoy a comfortable holiday at this resort in Yercaud?

Absolutely. Our resort is designed to offer a comfortable and memorable stay at a trusted family resort in Yercaud. This is why many visitors return and rate it as the best resort in Yercaud for family holidays.
